reason_for_decision: The article now connects range selection to warning time, site geometry, layered sensing, and validation logic in a way that clears the stricter PASS threshold.
strengths: It reframes range as an operational timing problem rather than a brochure number.
The added layered-system and planning-sequence sections improve real deployment value.
The article is now cleaner editorially and no longer carries the earlier product-led detour.
summary_assessment: This article now passes. It is practical, specific enough for real planning work, and aligned with the stricter review rubric.
